backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for invention project management, with CRUD operations (create, update, get, delete) and filtering by status, storing projects in a Map with timestamps.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping feature IDs to their implementing source files, related components, test IDs, and confidence levels for the PatentForge AI app.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object providing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file, noting key fixes such as deprecated Tailwind class replacements and import path corrections.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'Universal Invention to Patent App' and mounts the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for dashboard, new project, invention workspace, portfolio, and resources pages, all wrapped in AppLayout.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: App shell component rendering a sticky header with logo, desktop navigation links, a 'New Invention' CTA button, and a collapsible mobile menu, wrapping page content in a flex column layout.
frontend/src/components/VoiceInputButton: Reusable microphone button component that integrates the useVoiceInput hook to stream voice transcripts into a target field, with tooltip feedback and unsupported-browser handling.
frontend/src/components/workspace/AIColl: A React panel component that triggers AI analysis of an invention project, displaying a readiness score, novelty checklist, and suggestions. It uses a local `analyzeInvention` utility and shows loading/result states.
frontend/src/components/workspace/Claims: A read-only preview component that formats and syntax-highlights patent claim text, emphasizing legal transition words and patent qualifiers using inline HTML spans.
frontend/src/components/workspace/Lawyer: A dialog component that lets users customize a cover note and then download a formatted patent attorney submission package via the `downloadLawyerPackage` utility.
frontend/src/components/workspace/LegalP: A panel that displays categorized legal patent phrases from a static data source, allowing users to filter by category and click to insert a phrase into the claims editor.
frontend/src/components/workspace/Scient: A searchable panel listing scientific and patent terminology with definitions and patent-ready phrasing, supporting expand/collapse per term and copy-to-clipboard insertion.
frontend/src/data/learningResources.ts: A static data file exporting categorized learning resources (articles/guides) covering patent application processes, patent types, and prior art search for inventor education.
frontend/src/data/legalPhrases.ts: Defines a `LegalPhrase` interface and exports an array of common patent legal phrases (e.g., 'comprising', 'wherein', 'configured to') organized by category such as transition, qualifier, relationship, action, and claim-structure.
Defines a `ScientificTerm` interface and exports an array of scientific and patent-relevant terms (e.g., 'Actuator', 'Semiconductor', 'Polymer') with definitions, suggested patent phrasings, and categories.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAutoSave.ts: Custom hook that debounces saves of provided data by calling an async `onSave` callback after a configurable delay, exposing save status ('idle', 'saving', 'saved', 'error') and a `saveNow` function.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing Internet Computer authentication via `AuthClient`, exposing login/logout functions and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for CRUD operations on invention projects (get all, get by ID, get most recent, get by status, create, update, delete) using the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useVoiceInput.ts: Custom hook that wraps the Web Speech API to provide voice-to-text functionality, exposing state ('inactive', 'listening', 'error'), transcript, start/stop controls, and browser support detection.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and Space Grotesk fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a dark navy/gold design system with custom CSS variables, utility classes, and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying all invention projects as cards with status badges and readiness scores, supporting navigation to workspaces and project deletion via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/InventionWorkspace.ts: Full invention editing workspace page with auto-save, tabbed panels for AI collaboration, claims preview, legal phrases, and scientific terminology, plus export and lawyer package dialog functionality.
frontend/src/pages/NewProject.tsx: New project creation form page with fields for title, problem, solution, features, and claims, supporting voice input, text file import, and navigation to the workspace on submission.
frontend/src/pages/Portfolio.tsx: Portfolio page showing aggregated stats and a tabbed list of all invention projects grouped by status, with clickable rows navigating to each project's workspace.
frontend/src/pages/Resources.tsx: Learning resources page rendering an accordion of categorized patent education guides sourced from a static data file, with optional external links and a legal disclaimer footer.
frontend/src/utils/aiAnalysis.ts: Analyzes an invention project input and returns an AIAnalysis object with a readiness score, novelty checklist, and improvement suggestions based on field completeness and patent terminology usage.
frontend/src/utils/lawyerPackageExport.t: Generates a formatted multi-section patent attorney submission package as a plain-text string from an InventionProject and cover note, including technical disclosure, draft claims, and AI analysis sections.
frontend/src/utils/projectExport.ts: Exports an InventionProject to a formatted plain-text string and provides a utility function to trigger a browser download of that text as a file.
frontend/src/utils/projectImport.ts: Parses a previously exported plain-text invention project file back into a partial InventionProjectInput object by extracting titled sections and status fields via regex.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a dark-mode theme with custom navy and gold color palettes, extended typography, border radius, box shadows, and animations for the PatentForge UI.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state for the PatentForge AI app, including version metadata, architectural notes, existing feature definitions, known issues, and image requirements.
